description:
The UniformSizeRangeInitializer component makes particles in a particle system have a random size in a range.

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.MinValue: The minimum size particles can be on all 3 axies equally.
fields.MaxValue: The maximum size particles can be on all 3 axies equally.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
